title: Fix Console Worker CI image publish failure on main
description: CI publish job fails on main before updating CONSOLE_WORKER_IMAGE_URI because Dockerfile guard checks deleted MCP module paths. Update guard to validate current MCP runtime files and verify the publish workflow can complete branch env var update.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started on branch feature/console-worker-ci-image-guard-fix. Confirmed main run 25446922375 failed in Publish Console Worker Image before branch env var update, leaving CONSOLE_WORKER_IMAGE_URI stale on main.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementation in progress on feature/console-worker-ci-image-guard-fix. Fix is in Dockerfile and test_docker_context.py; pending PR/CI rerun to confirm publish job updates main branch CONSOLE_WORKER_IMAGE_URI.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Sub-task plx-d75e54 closed after code patch + targeted test pass.
